user.title: Thermal Efficiency – home settings
user.description: Whole-home sensors. You'll add rooms next, one at a time.

data.loft_since: Ignore loft sensor readings before this date (optional)
data.floor_area_m2: Floor area in m² (optional – normalises the heat loss coefficient)

room.title: Add a room
room.description: Pick a Versatile Thermostat climate entity to auto-fill this room's name and temperature sensor from it (its Area and EMA sensor), or leave blank to enter everything by hand.

error.duplicate_room: A room with this name was already added

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Thermal Efficiency instance is allowed

room.title: Review existing room
room.description: Reviewing your existing rooms, one at a time - fix an entity if needed, or just continue.

new_room.title: Add a new room
